s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH MASTER CYLINDER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install a new gasket to the clutch master cylinder assembly.
Install the clutch master cylinder with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CLUTCH LINE

s2.ptxt: Using SST, connect the clutch line.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CLUTCH RESERVOIR TUBE

s2.ptxt: Connect the clutch reservoir tube to the clutch master cylinder with the clip.

item.ptxt: Connect the clutch reservoir tube so that it will not be twisted.
Make sure that the green mark is positioned as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CLUTCH MASTER CYLINDER PUSH ROD CLEVIS

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the contact surface of the pin and clevis bushing.
Connect the clevis to the clutch pedal with the pin and a new clip.

atten4.ptxt: Install the pin from the left side of the vehicle.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL BRAKE BOOSTER ASSEMBLY
INSTALL COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Install the combination meter assembly with the 4 screws <E>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Install the combination meter assembly with the 4 screws <R>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL

s2.ptxt: Engage the guide and the 4 claws.
Install the instrument cluster finish panel with the 2 clips.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 2 clips to install the No. 1 instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.
Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw <B> and bolt <A>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.

Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw or

and bolt .

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips.
Install the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH with the cowl side trim clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL TOP PANEL OUTER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the outer cowl top panel sub-assembly with the 4 bolts and 4 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL WINDSHIELD WIPER LINK ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the windshield wiper motor and link assembly with the 4 bolts.

atten3.ptxt: Tighten the bolts in the order shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL TOP VENTILATOR LOUVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the cowl top ventilator louver sub-assembly.
Install the 2 clips.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT FENDER TO COWL SIDE SEAL LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw and install the front fender to cowl side seal LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT FENDER TO COWL SIDE SEAL RH

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw and install the front fender to cowl side seal RH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL WINDSHIELD WIPER ARM AND BLADE ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Operate the wiper and stop the windshield wiper motor at the automatic stop position.
Clean the wiper arm serrations.
When reinstalling:

s3.ptxt: Clean the wiper pivot serrations with a wire brush.

s2.ptxt: Install the front wiper arm and blade assembly LH with the nut to the position shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Hold the arm hinge by hand to fasten the nut.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL WINDSHIELD WIPER ARM AND BLADE ASSEMBLY RH

s2.ptxt: Operate the wiper and stop the windshield wiper motor at the automatic stop position.
Clean the wiper arm serrations.
When reinstalling:

s3.ptxt: Clean the wiper pivot serrations with a wire brush.

s2.ptxt: Install the front wiper arm and blade assembly RH with the nut to the position shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Hold the arm hinge by hand to fasten the nut.

s2.ptxt: Operate the front wipers while spraying washer fluid on the windshield glass. Make sure that the front wipers function properly and the wipers do not come into contact with the vehicle body.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR CLEANER CASE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the air cleaner case with the 3 bolts.
Connect the hose clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR CLEANER CAP SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the air cleaner filter element onto the air cleaner case.
Insert the hinges. Install the air cleaner cap sub-assembly with the 2 bolts.
Align the matchmarks of the No. 1 air cleaner hose and throttle body, and then connect the air cleaner hose No. 1 to the throttle body and unfasten the No. 1 air cleaner hose clamp.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the hose clamp is at the correct angle.

s2.ptxt: Connect the No. 2 ventilation hose to the air cleaner hose.
Connect the purge line hose to the clamp (*1).
Connect the 2 purge VSV vacuum hoses (*2).
Connect the purge VSV connector (*3).
Connect the mass air flow meter connector (*4).

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
BLEED CLUTCH PIPE LINE

s2.ptxt: Fill the brake reservoir with brake fluid and bleed the clutch system.

s-1.ptxt: CHECK BRAKE FLUID

s2.ptxt: Check the brake fluid (See page ).

item.ptxt: Check for leakage in the brake system.
Check for leakage in the clutch system.

s-1.ptxt: CHECK FLUID LEVEL IN RESERVOIR

s2.ptxt: Inspect the fluid level.
If brake fluid level is lowered, check for leakage and inspect the disc brake pad. If necessary, refill the reservoir with brake fluid after repair and replacement.

specitem.ptxt: SAE J1703 or FMVSS No. 116 DOT 3

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT AND ADJUST CLUTCH PEDAL SUB-ASSEMBLY
